title: When all subitems are done mark task as done
excerpt: Hello! I need to create a formula that will automatically mark a task as done once all the subitems have been marked as done

posts.author: aedwards (Alyssa)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I need to create a formula that will automatically mark a task as done once all the subitems have been marked as done

posts.author: joshuams (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml: Go to the automations center and search “when all” and it’ll come up as the second choice
